title: parodia columnaris
intro: Parodia columnaris, also known as the 'Rebutia columnaris,' is a species of flowering plant in the cactus family that is native to the Andes mountains in South America. The medicinal properties of Parodia columnaris include its ability to act as a purgative and to treat various infections, thanks to its high concentration of alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of consuming Parodia columnaris include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Parodia columnaris can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, including fever and respiratory issues.
